programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Loaded for Bear
programme.desc: Surrounded by aggressive and territorial black bears day and night, two survivalists must compete against the apex predators for resources in the Smoky Mountains of Tennessee.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ford Galaxie, Part I/ Bikini Contest
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron head to Roswell to pick-up a 1967 Ford Galaxie 500.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ford Galaxie, Part II/ Nash Healey
programme.desc: With Aaron temporarily missing, the crew works on the Ford Galaxie. The shop gets crank calls from a guy claiming to be Dale Earnhardt Jr.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Awesome Aussies and Olds
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron find a '55 Chevy Bel Air and 1950 Oldsmobile Coupe Rocket 88 that's been stored for over 50 years.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Mashed Up Mustang
programme.desc: Richard trades his friend a '58 Impala for a '67 Mustang. He flips a smoking '72 Pontiac Formula 400. Aaron and the crew rush to the scene of a Gas Monkey accident.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferocious Ford and Fast Ferrari
programme.desc: The Gas Monkey crew turn a rat-infested '38 Ford into a cool hot rod. Richard buys football player Emmitt Smith's Mercedes, which comes with a surprise. Richard gambles $400K on a banged up Ferrari F-40.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: No Bull Bonneville
programme.desc: Once again, Richard and Aaron stall the crazy, roadtripping Aussies with Texas hospitality while the crew races to finish a 59 Bonneville they were given only 72 hrs to fix up. To get some more cash for the job, Richard picks up two mini cars from a nest.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Far-Out Fairlane
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron resurrect two cars bought from a local charity: a '59 Fairlaine 500 Galaxie and a 1954 Bel Air. Richard is concerned for his safety at a Model A boneyard, but it's having to reject one of Sue's jobs that has him and Aaron most concerned.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Trials of a T-Bird
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron bring a hot '58 Corvette home to the new Gas Monkey World Headquarters. Christie takes a gamble, buying a '65 TBird while Richard is away. Model Alloy Ash fires up her welding torch to prove to Aaron she's more than just a pretty face.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Stung by a '67 Corvette Stingray
programme.desc: Richard buys a 1973 Dodge Challenger and the holy grail of Corvettes, a 1967 Stingray in hopes of a six-figure sale.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dodge Hodge Podge Part 1/ '65 Mustang
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron pick up a '64 Dodge Sweptline that's a mishmash of parts. A '32 Ford Roadster Richard forgot he bought rolls in, but it's up to Christie to seal the deal with the prospective buyer. KC hits the road with Richard to buy a '65 Mustang.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dodge Hodge Podge Part 2/ Oldsmobile Delta 88
programme.desc: The crew struggles to finish the '64 Dodge truck. Richard flips a '52 Chevy. He digs out an Oldsmobile Delta '88 he forgot he bought, but it's also not quite what he remembered. Broken brakes leave a dent in the garage door and Richard's wallet.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferrari Fix, Part 2/ 1917 REO
programme.desc: The crew pushes to finish the Ferrari F40 and get it sold. Costs rise when the $8000 windshield gets broken. Richard's luck turns when the 1967 Porsche 911S he buys turns out to be something better. Tom better get crankin' on a 1917 REO or he'll be fired.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Kody's Secret Plan
programme.desc: The Sister Wives announce to the kids that they've bought land in Flagstaff and they plan to move there within a month.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Moving Meltdowns
programme.desc: Kody sees the plans for his one giant polygamist house and loves them, but his wives may not. Just weeks away from leaving their homes in Las Vegas, tensions run high. Robyn presses Kody to settle down and Gabe walks out.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Leaving Las Vegas
programme.desc: The Brown family is finally moving to Flagstaff. Moving day is chaotic and the dream they are chasing is becoming a nightmare. There's rays of hope, but mostly it's tears as they face an uncertain future and leave so much behind.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: Judgement Day

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: I Don't Have a Choice
programme.desc: Anna reveals big news to her family. Angela fights for Michael's visa. Syngin needs more from Tania. Mike has tough questions for Natalie. Betsy grills Sasha about his past. Anny cries shopping for a wedding dress. Blake's mom tries to bond with Jasmin.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Kicked Out
programme.desc: The whole family has moved to Flagstaff and the women spend the day unpacking. They face struggles due to the weather, and, Meri's neighbours calling the police.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Most Outrageous Moments
programme.desc: Relive the most outrageous moments on the show as we look back at some of our favourite couples. Through unforgettable arrivals, culture clashes, lies, skeptical family and breakdowns, each couple has fought to find lasting love across the globe.

programme.title: Sister Wives: I Will Survive

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Jackie
programme.desc: 30-year-old Jackie dresses more like a 13-year-old slacker.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Annie
programme.desc: A mortgage broker/biker mom, whose personal style has never come out of the 1970's lesbian closet, needs to find a new sense of style and self.

programme.title: My 40-Year-Old Child: A New Case
programme.desc: Gabby is eight-years-old, but looks like a three-month-old baby. She isn't aging and no one knows why. Now, two new cases have emerged that could explain the mystery.

programme.title: The Boy With Bloody Tears
programme.desc: For the past two years, 17-year-old Calvino Inman has been regularly crying blood and no-one can explain why.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Somewhere in There Is a Foot
programme.desc: Stacy's life-threatening scar on her foot has left her hopeless, but she's giving it one last shot. David has the worst case of foot fungus Dr. Schaeffer has seen, and Morgan, an erotic paranormal romance novelist, is hoping to her sixth toe amputated.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Jackpot
programme.desc: Belinda is essentially immobilized by a lump on her neck. Nicole won't wed until she gets her armpit lump removed. Adela's chest and back are covered in wisdom spots. Nick foolishly removed a lipoma at home and now requires Dr. Lee's assistance.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: The Stench Is Amazing
programme.desc: If Tim doesn't grow up and get his home cleaned before his inheritance runs out, he'll lose the house and end up out on the street. A similar fate is in store for twin brothers Lorrin and Orin if their decades-long compulsion can't be curbed.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Leading a Double Life
programme.desc: A family suffers the effects of mould, mice and flea infestations because their upstairs neighbor and landlord has acquired one of the show's most massive hoards to date.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brittani's Story
programme.desc: Brittani married a man who loves large women, but at 600 pounds she can barely contribute to their marriage. With dreams of a normal relationship, she gets weight-loss surgery. Her world then changes, leaving her with the challenge to forge a new life.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Joe's Story
programme.desc: Joe is only 30 years old and trapped in an 800-lb body. He lost his job and is mostly housebound. Now, Joe needs to find the strength to face his past and save his life.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Old Gussy's Back

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day

programme.desc: Find out which trick was inspired by Michael's acting days, and which trick was modified because it was too messy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Popcorn Pants
programme.desc: Michael delivers a shock at a shipping store when wine tips over and gets bubble wrap tipsy. Then, at a popcorn shop, he dons the latest kernel fashions, and at a theater he stuns his helper with a trick that jumps off the screen.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dummy Talks

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Industrial Asphalt Sealant
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it. A man can vanish into a manhole, and maybe even a manhole can vanish itself.

programme.desc: Mina and Karen are the new owners of a very outdated and bland townhouse in the heart of the Bates-Hendricks neighborhood. Despite the maroon carpeting, peach wallpaper and active bird's nests, the home has a lot of potential.

programme.title: Good Bones: Chop and Pop
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in the Bates-Hendricks neighborhood and hoping to turn a profit this time around.

programme.title: Good Bones: Budget-busting Victorian
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a home near the Northside neighborhood that's full of historical features. They work on an open floor plan, but structural slow-downs and permitting nightmares threaten their schedule and budget.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Fan Faves: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Fan Faves: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Fan Faves: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Fan Faves: Master Suite of Mirrors
programme.desc: Nicole focuses her attention on the neglected master bedroom and must rethink the structure of the room to come up with a charming space the house deserves. She decides to add extra sleeping room by turning the laundry room into a second bedroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Fan Faves: Facing the Front Porch
programme.desc: The front of her Lake Orion, MI, house is barely accessible, and the driveway is solid dirt. Nicole sets out to reverse that by renovating the front porch and adding a Model-T style driveway. She also adds a white picket fence and heavy landscaping.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Fan Faves: A Kitchen Nightmare
programme.desc: Nicole knows that the kitchen and dining room are the heart of this home and want to make them the house's functional centerpiece. She rips out what was left behind and starts over with a new layout, cabinets and appliances.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Fan Faves: Returning to Campbell
programme.desc: Nicole returns to her first big Detroit flip, the Campbell house, where a pipe burst and ruined the upstairs and downstairs kitchens. She decides to restore both spaces a second time using any pieces she can salvage.

programme.title: One of a Kind: Canoe Believe It?
programme.desc: Grace Mitchell meets a couple who recently purchased a mid-century modern lake house with a rich history but in desperate need of some work.

programme.title: One of a Kind: From Pink to Palace
programme.desc: Grace gives back to a couple that's helps others and raised the next generation. In six weeks the team update the very pink home by opening the kitchen and transforming the sunroom into an outdoor deck packed with custom details.

programme.title: One of a Kind: Southern Revival
programme.desc: Grace Mitchell tackles the home of a chef and her husband where the interior doesn't reflect their Southern roots. To bring in that charm, Grace creates an elegant dining room and gives the homeowner a proper kitchen of her own.

programme.title: One of a Kind: From Groovy to Gorgeous
programme.desc: A couple is moving back into her childhood house and calls on Grace to create a new home that honours the family's memories while fitting their current story, too. Grace creates a home that can be passed down for generations.

programme.title: One of a Kind: A Storied Style
programme.desc: Interior designer Grace Mitchell and her team combine unexpected personal elements, shocking wallpaper and even a windmill to turn Trista and Mark's Fort Worth house into a home that tells their story in a touching and uniquely personal way.

programme.title: One of a Kind: The Bank Bathroom
programme.desc: A couple that shares a bathroom with their young daughter calls on Grace and her crew to renovate their Colonial and give them a master suite. Grace incorporates his background as a fifth-generation banker and her love of monograms into her design.

programme.title: One of a Kind: Amazing Grace
programme.desc: Grace and her team transform a cramped cottage into a celebration of family and hope. She alters the look and flow of the home with a two-sided fireplace and uses a surprise family heirloom in the center of the new design.

programme.title: One of a Kind: Rock Star Ceiling
programme.desc: Grace and her team are tasked with finding more space for a couple whose home doesn't fit their deep love of cooking and entertaining. A 'party pantry' is created with 3D wallpaper and the showstopper is a dining room ceiling that sparks tears.

programme.title: One of a Kind: Hidden Lake House
programme.desc: A couple with a coveted lake home in Fort Worth, TX, wants to throw big gatherings, but their cramped space makes it impossible. Grace orders the longest dining table imaginable for future parties.

programme.title: One of a Kind: The Wine Cellar Bathroom
programme.desc: A couple need help after their house flooded and they want a fresh start. They want to remodel their damaged living room and turn their quirky mother-in-law suite into a master retreat free of water damage, but filled with their story.

programme.title: One of a Kind: Love Letter Walls
programme.desc: Grace uses a couple's courtship as inspiration as she transforms a dated 1960s home. Her signature design touches include personalized wallpaper and a custom backsplash sign that highlights their love for one another and their rich family history.

programme.title: One of a Kind: The Attic Surprise
programme.desc: Grace and her team tackle a family's Victorian home with layout problems and a complete lack of personality. She uses the couple's passions for cooking and gardening to give them a kitchen with history and reorganizes the upstairs footprint.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Couple Is Torn Between Fixing Up Their Home in the City or Moving to the Country for More Land
programme.desc: Thomas and Sarah purchased their home near the city in a neighbourhood close to where Thomas grew up. Thomas loves the location, but Sarah feels the cramped quarters confine her. She wants an open concept, but it must be in the country.

programme.title: Love It or List It: New Kid on the Block
programme.desc: When new parents Ryan and Ashley bought their home, it was in a desirable neighbourhood but it was the worst house on the block. They got it for a great price, but of course, it needed a ton of renovations.

programme.title: Love It or List It: One Last Renovation
programme.desc: Kerry and Dave renovated and added to their home as their family grew, but their three kids have taken over every common room, leaving little to no space for the couple. Kerry would love a home with updated bathrooms and a dedicated space for the kids.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Laundry Overload
programme.desc: With two children and a third on the way, life for Breanne and Justin is fun but hectic. Justin is already overwhelmed with the daily struggles of living in a small house, including limited laundry space and bathroom availability.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Sex Tape Scandal
programme.desc: As journalists uncover a trail of lawsuits and confidential settlements concerning underage girls, an underground sex tape emerges that puts R. Kelly in a compromising position.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: The People vs. R. Kelly
programme.desc: R. Kelly goes to trial in Chicago on multiple counts of child pornography for his alleged participation in a sex tape involving a minor.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: All the Missing Girls
programme.desc: Parents of girls in R. Kelly's camp accuse him of keeping them psychologically and sexually imprisoned. One mother fights to get her daughter back, and wins.

programme.title: Surviving R. Kelly: Black Girls Matter

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum: The Loch Ness Monster Lives

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Begins
programme.desc: An elite team of specialists use an advanced data algorithm to pinpoint when and where to encounter Bigfoot. Armed with the latest technology, they are in a race against time as they search for the elusive beast in the unforgiving Oregon wilderness.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Did You Hear That?
programme.desc: With one team member down, Russell and Mireya head back into the forest to hunt down their leads. Their intense investigation uncovers their first pieces of possible Bigfoot evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Nest
programme.desc: Russell stumbles upon a structure he believes is a Bigfoot nest. Ronny and Mireya race to the nest to collect DNA samples that could break open their investigation.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Red Eyes at Night
programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny make a powerful discovery in the area surrounding the nest. When Russell suddenly falls ill, Bryce tests the theory that Bigfoot can render humans sick by emoting infrasound and is doing this to keep the team out of its territory.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Human Bait
programme.desc: The team plants tiny trackers around the clearing hoping they will cling to Bigfoot's fur. Mireya and Ronny return to where they heard whistles and saw glowing eyes. This time they have a plan: Mireya agrees to be bait in order to lure out Bigfoot.

programme.title: Lost in the Wild: Amazon's Atlantis
programme.desc: J.J. Kelley and Kinga Philipps head into the heart of the Amazon to follow in the footsteps of three adventurers who went missing while in search of the fabled lost city of Akakor. An enigmatic tour guide may be the key to solving the decades-old mystery.

programme.title: Black-ish: Fifty-Three Percent
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have been fighting more than usual and they decide to go back to their therapist who suggests they make time for a date night. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane take advantage of Devante's bouncy house in different kinds of ways.

programme.title: Black-ish: Blue Valentime
programme.desc: Tensions are high between Dre and Bow as their contractor arrives to remodel the kitchen, realizing they have grown apart. Dre reflects on the good times in his relationship with Bow.

programme.title: Movie: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa
programme.desc: An 86-year-old man takes a trip from Nebraska to North Carolina to take his 8-year-old grandson back to his real father.

programme.title: Movie: Dumb and Dumber To
programme.desc: Dimwitted pals Harry and Lloyd are reunited after 20 years. When an old postcard informs Harry that he fathered a child, he and Lloyd set out to find his daughter, who was put up for adoption.

programme.title: Movie: Ted 2
programme.desc: After tying the knot, newlyweds Ted and Tami-Lyn are ready to start a family. They prepare for artificial insemination, but in order to gain custody of his child, Ted must go to court to prove that he's a person.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spyfall, Part One
programme.desc: Intelligence agents around the world are under attack from alien forces. MI6 turns to the only people who can help: the Doctor and friends. As they travel the globe for answers, attacks come from all sides.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spyfall, Part Two
programme.desc: A terrifying plan to destroy humanity is about to reach fruition. Can the Doctor and her friends escape multiple traps and defeat a deadly alliance?

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: Mystery of the Screaming Man
programme.desc: In1881a team of Victorian Egyptologists unwrapped the Screaming Man, a mummy whose bizarre appearance contradicted everything scholars then knew about Egyptian mummification.

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: The Pyramid Code
programme.desc: The Great Pyramid at Giza is one out of more than 100 pyramids spread across Egypt. Egyptologists are trying to get to the bottom of the pyramid code.

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: The achievements of the Scorpion King may have laid the foundations of Egypt.

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: News theories allow archaeologists to try to resolve the riddle of the Sphinx: who created it and whom does it represent?

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: The Real Ramses
programme.desc: Ramses II was perhaps the greatest pharaoh in Egyptian history.

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: Secrets of the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: The evolution of tomb building in the valley is explored with the latest technology.

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: The Real Cleopatra
programme.desc: Cleopatra is one of the ancient world's most famous and enigmatic figures; examination of her life and the city she built shows Cleopatra was not a temptress who ruled through seduction, but rather an intelligent leader and a canny politician.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Honeymoon Hell
programme.desc: Cesar helps actress Rhona Mitra curb her bulldog Oscar's violent tendencies. Later, newlyweds Lisa and Paul hope Cesar can sort out the canine conundrum that has cut their honeymoon short.

programme.title: Brazil: Jewels of the Jungle
programme.desc: The Mata Atlantica, a forest older and richer than the Amazon, harbours animals found nowhere else in the world. Explore the creatures that inhabit this forest, including the muriqui monkeys and the swifts that live behind the raging Iguazu Falls.

programme.title: Brazil: Feast of the Giant Anteater
programme.desc: The grassland that covers the central region of Brazil is one of that country’s least-known habitats, and is home to some of the most extraordinary animals on earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Penguin's New 'Do
programme.desc: A penguin stuck in molt for a year has hopefully seen the last of his bad hair days.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Love is a Cheetah Cub
programme.desc: The Columbus Zoo and Aquarium makes room for three adorable new cheetah cubs.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Welcome to the Family
programme.desc: The staff at the Columbus Zoo can hardly contain themselves as they prepare to make a home for an orphaned baby gorilla.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Upper Hoof
programme.desc: It's a full day for the vets when Dr. Pol wrangles a foursome of gutsy cows who refuse their pregnancy checks and Dr. Brenda deals with an after-hours emergency when Sisco the horse is down with colic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol-tergeist
programme.desc: Halloween is coming and Dr. Pol is in his element dealing with jumping, flailing and barking clientele.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Nerves of Steer
programme.desc: Horses are driving Dr. Pol wild as he works to fix chunky runny noses, gruesome gashes and even penile problems.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Udderly Frozen
programme.desc: Vets, calves and cats are all having a hard time after getting the cold shoulder from Jack Frost this winter. Farmers, livestock and pets work to adapt while Dr. Pol stays warm the only way he knows how — by keeping busy.

programme.title: How It's Made: Tequila, Waterbeds, Flip Flops, Silver
programme.desc: Discover what goes into making tequila, waterbeds, flip-flops, and silver.

programme.title: How It's Made: Handmade Hammers, Gummy Vitamins, Boat Trailers, Tea Lights & Jar Candles
programme.desc: We find out how handmade hammers, gummy vitamins, boat trailers, and tea lights and jar candles are made.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Seven Wonders
programme.desc: The Seven Wonders are the engineering marvels built by great minds of long-lost civilizations, but we're not sure if some even existed. New discoveries and cutting-edge archaeological methods might prove what they looked like and why they disappeared.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Seven Wonders
programme.desc: The Seven Wonders are the engineering marvels built by great minds of long-lost civilizations, but we're not sure if some even existed. New discoveries and cutting-edge archaeological methods might prove what they looked like and why they disappeared.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Seven Wonders
programme.desc: The Seven Wonders are the engineering marvels built by great minds of long-lost civilizations, but we're not sure if some even existed. New discoveries and cutting-edge archaeological methods might prove what they looked like and why they disappeared.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Earth Next Door
programme.desc: Astronomers detect a potentially habitable planet tantalizingly close to Earth. A chance discovery at NASA reveals a top secret military space program. The Apollo missions bring back evidence that the moon could be rich in the building blocks for life.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Full Moon
programme.desc: Two cosmonauts are trapped inside a capsule in a frozen lake; a NASA scientist investigates the deadly Nazi secret that doomed the Hindenburg; a full moon affects NASA experiments.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: CIA's Secret Revenge
programme.desc: When the Soviet Union unveils its own space shuttle, the CIA hatches a secret revenge plot. Recent discoveries shed new light on the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah. A missing nuclear weapon could threaten a NASA base in the Arctic.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Stranger Things
programme.desc: Astronomers find evidence for alien technology around a distant star; the first pictures of Pluto show that something might be moving across its surface.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Ghosts on a Comet
programme.desc: When a Chinese moon rover breaks down, a NASA scientist points to a mysterious material that seemed to sabotage the Apollo missions decades earlier. The Rosetta spacecraft finds a comet that appears to be singing.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mars's Deepest Secret
programme.desc: British astronomers working for the CIA intercept Soviet photos of the moon. A malfunction on the ISS could poison its crew with deadly ammonia gas. A startling image taken by a NASA probe points to evidence that life could exist on Mars.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: 15 Years Running
programme.desc: In 1993 a man was convicted of selling narcotics in South Carolina. He had already been incarcerated for a similar charge before and, not wanting to return to prison, failed to show up to serve his time.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hip Hop Homicide
programme.desc: A rising hip-hop star is gunned down in Orlando, Florida and detectives work around the clock to bring closure to the mourning parents.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Ticking Time Bomb
programme.desc: Detectives are assigned a parolee who's on the most wanted list, and perform a building-to-building search for the man.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hip Hop Homicide
programme.desc: A rising hip-hop star is gunned down in Orlando, Florida and detectives work around the clock to bring closure to the mourning parents.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Couple on the Run
programme.desc: After a drug deal goes wrong, a man is shot and collapses behind a dumpster, ending up on life support. A couple are wanted in connection to this attempted murder.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: American Justice: A Warrant to Kill
programme.desc: A look at the dispute between Deputy Sheriff Joseph Kent McGowan and Susan White.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Always Remain Calm
programme.desc: Tampa first responders have a chaotic night treating seizure and overdose patients; the ROC Squad Task Force tracks down suspected armed robbers in a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Stranger Things
programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: Sheriff Jamey Noel has devised an unprecedented program to root out crime and corruption in the Clark County Jail. His plan is to send seven volunteer civilians into jail as undercover inmates.

programme.title: 60 Days In: First Timers
programme.desc: Sheriff Jamey Noel's program is underway. Zac, a Marine, Tami, a police officer, Robert, a teacher, and Barbra, a stay-at-home mom, are the first participants in.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Cell Shock
programme.desc: Isaiah, a 19-year-old from a rough neighbourhood, and Maryum, a social worker and the eldest daughter of Muhammad Ali, join the program. Isaiah witnesses a violent fight between inmates. Maryum fits into F-pod effortlessly.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Fight Face
programme.desc: Jeff, the final participant, enters the jail. Isaiah and Robert fear their covers may be blown. Robert makes a risky move, forcing Captain Maples to follow through with consequences.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Blood Atonement
programme.desc: Estephania LeBaron was raised to believe that her father and brothers were holy men, and that the terrible things they did in God's name were just. But she questions everything when faced with having to do the same terrible things herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In the Lion's Cage
programme.desc: Linda Wittmier and Terry Jo Howard both fell in love with James Michael Randall. And both suffered when they discovered the monster that lurked inside him. But they never realized how lucky they were to survive his twisted sexual desire to kill.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son's Prisoner
programme.desc: Shelly Lietz had been afraid of her son ever since he was four years old. She knew she saw something evil in his eyes that scared her. As he got older and more violent, that fear crippled her, eventually making her a prisoner in her own home.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Have To Do The Right Thing
programme.desc: When Tim Kreider discovered proof that his son, Alec, was responsible for a horrific crime, he knew what the right thing to do was.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Sandra never expected such extreme reprisals from Norman, a man she once called her partner. But when her daughter is caught in the crosshairs, no one can predict how far Norman will go.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: It Was All Judith
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. Tormented by guilt, he kept her deadly secret for years. Knowing what she was capable of, he wasn't sure he could tell the truth and live.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Terrifying Calls
programme.desc: A young girl disappears on her way home from school and the only clue police have is a series of terrifying calls her family had received in the days before she went missing.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Under His Thumb
programme.desc: Jamie Clark had already been twice unlucky in love, so when she met Anthony Lord she thought the third time would be the charm. But by the time she realized what perverted plans he had for her, she was already trapped.

programme.desc: Hardworking nurse Tara opens a chilling text from a nameless sender - someone who knows her and means her harm.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Crushed
programme.desc: When a high school crush turns into a dangerous obsession, popular cheerleader Kathleen is thrown into a decade of torment at the hands of a stalker who will stop at nothing to realise his darkest fantasies.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: From the Gridiron to the Grave
programme.desc: High School football star Travis Davis is gunned down on the mean streets of the Queen City, sending detective Garry McFadden on the hunt for justice. McFadden discovers a beef from the street might be the lead that sends him straight to his killer.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Two Sides of Charlotte
programme.desc: Two sides of Charlotte collide when Detective Garry McFadden finds himself investigating the murder of a beloved elderly 'church lady' from 'old Charlotte money' who was robbed and attacked in her home as she returned from church.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A wealthy power-couple's marriage is in shambles. When the husband reports killing his wife in self-defense, it's up to Detective McFadden to prove, against long odds and high-priced attorneys, that this influential citizen is a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Dateline: The Informant
programme.desc: A young woman’s chilling story about a girl’s abduction and murder helps re-open a case that has haunted a New York town for decades.

programme.title: Dateline: The Family Secret
programme.desc: A long-haul truck driver goes missing and his family is concerned.

programme.title: Dateline: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Johnny Hincapie was imprisoned for 25 years for his alleged role in the 1990 stabbing death of a Utah tourist, Brian Watkins, on a subway platform. Watkins's murder galvanized New York City during the most violent year in its history.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love You to Death
programme.desc: Adopted 17-year-old Chelsea Schobert has always felt out of place at home. She seeks acceptance online where she meets Shawn. But as their relationship develops, all is not as it seems and the whole family is drawn into a devastating series of events.

programme.title: Web of Lies: High on Love
programme.desc: High school student Brandon Wentzell falls for blonde beauty Clarissa Chistiakov online. But the course of virtual love doesn't run smooth as the past collides with a toxic present, shattering lives.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: 36-year old Indle King courts beautiful 18-year old Anastasia Solovieva online. She travels from her home in Kyrgyztan to Seattle to marry him, but her American dream turns into a nightmare when she realizes that Indle is not the man she thought he was.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Angela Allen joins a social networking site where she soon falls in love. After weeks of texting, they decide to meet in person. Their first meeting seems to trouble Angela, but when she goes out for a second time, she never comes home.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Lone Wolves
programme.desc: Vietnam War sniper Carlos Hathcock takes on deadly covert missions, and Max Hardberger recovers illegally seized cargo ships out of dangerous third world ports.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Battling the Elements
programme.desc: Firefighter Jack Pritchard fearlessly charges into blazing infernos to rescue victims, and when Hurricane Katrina pounded New Orleans, John Keller stepped up to save residents of his apartment building.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.desc: The Owens work to finish the roof, but multiple falling objects and whiteout conditions make the job perilous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Have Saw, Will Cut

programme.title: Building Alaska: Gotta Be Efficient

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Most Amazing View
programme.desc: The teams continue to struggle as their build seasons come to a close. Jackie's team hurries to finish the interior of her cabin, while the Owens team is at risk of not finishing their client's cabin on time.

programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down the Lincoln Cabin and Building a Dog Trot
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work to dismantle a barn built by Abe Lincoln's uncle around 1830.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rescuing a Massive Barn, Finishing the Lincoln Cabin
programme.desc: The guys rescue a huge double-pen barn in St. Meinrad, Indiana. It's the biggest dogtrot-style barn they've ever faced. They have to fight through modern layers of tin and barnwood to get to the incredible, pioneer-era handhewn beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Repurposing Every Beam From a Pennsylvania Bank Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a Pennsylvania Bank Barn in hopes of recovering the Long Beams and Huge Sleeper Logs that lay below. They are up against the weather, the machines malfunctioning and the weight of the logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging a Homestead Corn Crib With a Hometown Barn Raising
programme.desc: The guys salvage a homestead corn crib with a good old fashioned barn raising.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Wading With Alligators to Build a Two-Story Hunting Lodge in Florida
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take the bones of an old Virginia log home down to Florida, where they turn it into a two-story hunting lodge. Mark makes mouth blown wavy glass for the windows, and dives in an alligator pond to get some long leaf pine for the floors.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Monster Cupcakes
programme.desc: It's monster truck madness as four bakers battle for a place at the VIP Pre-Race Pit Party for Monster Truck Jam.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beach Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe goes surfside for a coastal fairground adventure. He'll sample creative beach eats from midway vendors all around the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seafood Sampler
programme.desc: Noah Cappe dives into the fairground for some of the yummiest seafood snacks on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Mighty Meatless
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe finds veggie-friendly treats that don't need meat to be indulgent. He tries plenty of delicious, salad-inspired snacks on fairgrounds across the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Albuquerque
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Albuquerque's desert gems, from enchiladas to nut rolls.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Honolulu

programme.title: Simply Laura: The Little Black Dress Ingredient

programme.title: Simply Laura: One-Pot Meals
programme.desc: Laura Vitale creates some comforting one-pot meals for her cousin Kate and her husband, who are adjusting to life with a new baby.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Vermont Bed and Breakfast Style

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: A Basket of Brunch Goodies

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Beach-y Keen Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby uses the brightest and boldest flavors in his Jerk Pork Belly & Sweet Potato Hash with Fried Eggs and makes Coconut Waffles with Chocolate Maple Syrup & Bananas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Mountains Of Meat
programme.desc: Michael Symon meets a chef bringing the Indian street food flavors of his childhood to Asheville, N.C., with his own take on a sloppy joe that he calls a Sloppy Jai, with lamb hash and 30 Indian spices.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: O.G. Flavor

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory

programme.title: Conan

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Big Buttercream Breakthrough

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And Martha Stewart Have a Ball
programme.desc: Max and Caroline plan to attend a big fashion gala at a museum where Martha Stewart is scheduled to be a guest, in an attempt to have her taste their cupcakes and get her seal of approval.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane

programme.desc: The DeBertis take on the ambitious task of turning a mid-size truck into a one-of-a-kind street racing machine that can switch seamlessly from drifting to road racing. The job could launch a new custom parts business but may require the team to relocate.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Armed with what's left of an avalanche victim's gear, Dave and Cody show how to survive in the harsh Rocky Mountains. Facing sub-zero temperatures, they make their way down a jagged ice waterfall, build a snow cave and try to salvage a dead elk carcass.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of the Clouds
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take only a poncho, a specimen jar, and a broken lighter with them to take on the wet cloud forests of Panama.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Cody and Dave take on a survival scenario in South Africa's backcountry where dehydration kills in hours and hungry super-predators kill even faster. Armed with nothing but a machete, they show how to escape the bush without getting eaten alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Up the River
programme.desc: In Kentucky, Dave and Cody take on a scenario of two kayakers who are dumped into the cold river just a few hours before sundown. To make things worse, they become separated from each other by two miles of rushing river. Then, Dave traps an irate skunk.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Bitten
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how to survive the rugged jungle in Thailand using only the gear an ill-equipped ecotourist might carry for a day trek: a Thai jungle knife, steel wool, a sharpening stone, a damaged cell phone and a bag of tobacco.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Man Up or Bow Out
programme.desc: Trying to survive 21 days completely solo, All-Star survivalist Luke McLaughlin takes on the dangerous badlands of South Africa. Stalked by ferocious lions and hyenas, Luke must get a kill if he has a chance to finish the challenge.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Land of Monsters
programme.desc: Snake hunter Dusty Crum wages war on thousands of invasive pythons killing the Everglades, backed by his one-of-a-kind team of snake hunters.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Night Terror
programme.desc: Rival snake hunters encroach on Dusty's hunting spot, so he and his team take a major risk by day and night hunting deep in the dangerous Sawgrass Plains.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Fists Full of Snakes
programme.desc: Dusty and his team mount a critical hunt from a swamp buggy before racing south to the python-infested Ten Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Snakes in the Dark
programme.desc: Dusty leads the team to an abandoned missile factory near the epicenter of the snake epidemic that could hold the biggest concentration of pythons in the Everglades.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Enter the Super Snake
programme.desc: Dusty and team discover a frightening new hybrid Python species when they trek deep into the dense Python Pines to prevent the snakes from laying their eggs.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Dusty vs The Monster
programme.desc: When a potentially record-breaking python escapes Dusty's grasp, his obsession to catch it brings him face to face with the massive reptile in the most dangerous solo mission of his career.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Showtime
programme.desc: It's a star studded premiere as Jenna and Val from Dancing with the Stars waltz into Kleinfeld to find her dream dress. WWE Hall of Famer Mick Foley steps out of the ring to help his friend Heather find a last minute dress after hers is ruined.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Not on the Guest List

programme.desc: The girls travel to Vegas and Kourtney gets the results of her pregnancy test.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Helping Hand
programme.desc: The family gives back to the community when they take in a homeless man.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Peter Weber from 'The Bachelor' stops by our studio to preview the wild new season.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: On the streets of New York, unsuspecting taxi passengers find themselves in the middle of a TV game show. They can either win money by answering a series of fun questions correctly, or they can answer three questions wrong and be sent out on the street.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Dog Tired
programme.desc: Khloé and Kendall consider getting guns for protection, Kris imposes strict guidelines for her mom to follow in her new condo, and later Kim can't handle her new rambunctious puppy.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Baby One More Time
programme.desc: Kim gets some big news about the future of her family. Later, Kim and Khloe compete to win the affection from Kris.

programme.title: Movie: Step Up
programme.desc: A ballerina from a wealthy family wants to incorporate hip hop to her repertoire and learns lessons about dancing and life from a tough kid from the wrong side of Baltimore.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: I Doughnut Know What to Think!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman ask the seven young bakers to make a giant doughnut cake. Using Bundt cake pans, the bakers make a cake in an assigned flavor like strawberry or maple and then decorate it to look like an oversized doughnut.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: International Intrigue
programme.desc: The six young bakers must fake it to make it as Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge them to create imposters that look like international dishes, such as sushi or shish kebab, but taste like dessert.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Hole-y Hedgehogs
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the five young bakers to each make a poke cake with fillings such as pureed fruit or pudding.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Extra Icing: Beauty Is in the Pie of the Beholder
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman present the four young bakers with late-summer fruit and challenge them to bake a beautiful, delicious pie. Only the cream of the crop will make it to the finale.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Out of This World
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman are lost in space and challenge the three remaining bakers to create cakes that look like a spaceship, aliens or another planet.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Beyond the Fringe
programme.desc: To kick off the season, Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman are going back to the 1970s as they challenge the 12 young competitors to make shag cakes. Each baker must make a cake in their chosen flavor and then decorate it to create a shag texture.

programme.title: Challenge: The Wizard of Oz Cakes
programme.desc: Ian Ziering welcomes four cake artists to the kitchen as Challenge celebrates the 80th anniversary of The Wizard of Oz. Winning Food Network Challenge takes courage, brains and a lot of heart, and although four start the journey, only three will continue.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweet Heat
programme.desc: First, it's a pizza puzzle when the chefs open the appetizer basket to find something that's called pizza but doesn't look or taste like the dish they know and love. Two proteins in the second round require the competitors' attention.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Brunch Is in the Fridge!
programme.desc: Ree hosts brunch and makes things easy with a make-ahead spread. She gathers ingredients for a customizable bloody Mary, makes a tater tot casserole, fresh citrus salad with champagne vinegar dressing and pours some tropical bellinis for friends.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Healthy Twists
programme.desc: Longtime friend Chef Art Smith visits Trisha in the kitchen to share some healthy but classic Southern dishes. Trisha impresses him with her slimmed down carrot cake and un-fried chicken while Art takes on the ultimate garlic cauliflower mash.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Slim Down Secrets
programme.desc: Being healthy and balanced has become important to Trisha and her niece Ashley, who is joining Trisha in the kitchen today to share some healthy cooking secrets.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Feel-Good Food
programme.desc: Trisha and her friend Allie cook up a hearty and good-for-you meal of kale and chorizo soup, smashed sweat pea burgers with a side of cold cucumber salad and bake apples.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Harvest Challenge
programme.desc: Spending three years on tour left Trisha Yearwood without her own garden, so she decided to sign up for a CSA box. Trisha loves fresh produce but can't always grow it herself, so the box is a perfect way to keep her on track and support local farmers.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Gal's Best Friend
programme.desc: To celebrate the adoption anniversary of her dog, Millie, Trisha Yearwood makes a healthy lunch with her friend, Lisa, before taking their dogs on a hike.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Playdate
programme.desc: Molly Yeh invites her sister-in-law Anna and her baby Cliff over for a playdate with Molly's daughter Bernie. They work up quite an appetite with all that playing, so Molly makes homemade granola bar treats.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Almost Healthy
programme.desc: Ree is making almost healthy and totally fabulous versions of classics. There's everyone's favourite cheeseburger sliders with portobellos instead of buns, fantastic cauliflower fried rice, zucchini lasagna and almost-instant fast and fruity ice cream.

programme.title: Mary McCartney Serves It Up: Burgers, Brownies and Slaw with Stanley Tucci
programme.desc: It's the most delicious invite in London as passionate vegetarian Mary McCartney puts her own spin on American classics for lunch with her friend Stanley Tucci. Mary shares family stories while making black bean burgers, thousand island dressing and more.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Trail Mix and Match
programme.desc: Four talented junior chefs are ready to prove their expertise in the kitchen to the judges. In the first round, there's a run on tortillas in the pantry as the young competitors figure out what to do with 'poor man's lobster' and a sweet surprise.

programme.title: Chopped: Amped For Ramps
programme.desc: Competitors find a member of the onion family in the first basket, an organ meat and Italian treat in the second and in the dessert round, chefs must use a popcorn-flavored candy and a citrus-flavored stalk.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have a Hippo?

programme.title: Bunk'd: Griff is in the House!

programme.title: Jessie: Hoedown Showdown
