programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Slop, Drop and Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol certainly has a lot on his plate when a pit-bull is in for emergency surgery, a pair of pups run into a prickly porcupine, and Smoke the pet pig is attacked.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: It's Raining Hen
programme.desc: Popeye the therapy rabbit comes into Pol Clinic with overgrown teeth but leaves with a couple of dates when his owner, Jodi, persuades Dr. Pol to donate dinner with himself and Diane for a fundraiser.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Spacewalk of Doom
programme.desc: An astronaut on a spacewalk begins to drown.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars
programme.desc: When NASA spots a something on Mars that resembles Stonehenge, they investigate what could have made this strange structure. Scientists discover a mysterious hole in Saturn's rings. An ancient tribe claims contact with alien visitors.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Sun's Evil Twin
programme.desc: Two suns photographed in the sky over Indonesia could be a trick of light, or the first sighting of the Sun's evil twin; NASA scientists are baffled by ghostly white swirls on the Moon's surface.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Milky Way is dying, and using the latest science and discoveries, experts are investigating what's killing it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Milky Way is dying, and using the latest science and discoveries, experts are investigating what's killing it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Friends Without Benefits
programme.desc: As the seven participants get deeper into the program, Zac's strength as an inmate is tested when he is unexpectedly called to court.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Full Inmate
programme.desc: As the participants approach the midway point, tension and anger grow among the women in F-Pod, while one of the men finds himself in imminent danger from the inmates in C-Pod.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Pod Drama
programme.desc: Life in Clark County Jail gets harder for the participants as the days go by. Jeff is physically attacked while Zac and Isaac are unexpectedly moved from C-pod, to a more violent D-pod. In F-pod, Barbara feels betrayed and Tami gets a surprise visit.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Shakedown
programme.desc: As the participants cross the halfway point, increased tensions and drug activity in D-pod lead the Sheriff to order a CERT raid, while fear of a contagious rash sweeps through F-pod.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Alone for the Holidays
programme.desc: Thanksgiving presents new opportunities and challenges for the six remaining participants, and one of them is pushed to a breaking point.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Institutionalized
programme.desc: As the participants near the end of their time in jail, tension in F-Pod pushes one woman over the edge and compromises the program, while both men in D-Pod struggle to avoid criminal activity that may have serious consequences.

programme.title: 60 Days In: 11th Hour
programme.desc: As pressure builds in each of the jail's pods, the five remaining participants in the program try to finish up their final few days inside.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Exodus
programme.desc: Three participants remain in Clark County Jail. One of the women in F-Pod is released, leaving Tami on the verge of a meltdown. Meanwhile in D-Pod, with one pod boss removed and another claiming power, there is a constant threat of violence.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?

programme.desc: Baton Rouge paramedics rush to the aid of a man attacked by his girlfriend with a box-cutter knife. Gunshots fired in Yonkers send Ariel and Cunningham to save a man down. In Austin, first responders plead with a patient to go to the hospital.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Heroes Among Us
programme.desc: When the men and women serving New Orleans get word that one of their own has been critically injured, they reflect on the risks they all take.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Life on the Line

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Monkey in the Middle
programme.desc: A man finds himself living between hostile neighbors on both sides, including a former marine with severe PTSD. Their campaign of intimidation ramps up to the point of no return, ending with a deadly confrontation on the street outside their homes.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Times, Deadly Measures
programme.desc: An Appalachian couple is delighted when their neighbors return home after mysteriously disappearing for ten years. But they've changed, for the worse, unleashing a campaign of endless intimidation and harassment that ultimately ends in a bloodbath.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of Shards
programme.desc: A childish joke between neighbouring kids turns into an all-out war when the adults get involved. For some, the laughter will end forever.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened to Rachael?
programme.desc: A year after a young teacher was gunned down outside of her Pennsylvania home, there is still no arrest and many wonder if this case will ever be solved.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: In Rison, Arkansas, a young woman is abducted from her home in the middle of the night. When investigators ultimately dig up her body in the woods, they uncover a horrible murder plot that led to the victim's gruesome demise.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Oklahoma Horror Story
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving in Oklahoma City, a husband and wife are at home when two masked gunmen allegedly ambush them and kill the husband. With few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: In Rison, Arkansas, a young woman is abducted from her home in the middle of the night. When investigators ultimately dig up her body in the woods, they uncover a horrible murder plot that led to the victim's gruesome demise.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened to Rachael?
programme.desc: A year after a young teacher was gunned down outside of her Pennsylvania home, there is still no arrest and many wonder if this case will ever be solved.

programme.title: Love Kills: Matchmaker to Murder
programme.desc: When Damarius and his girlfriend Alyssa find out she's pregnant, the couple's parents are furious. The friction culminates in a terrible tragedy, resulting the arrest of Damarius. Weeks later, a surprising twist will reveal the couple's darkest secret.

programme.title: Love Kills: We Were Like Fire
programme.desc: When Judy and Duane meet, they both long for excitement and to escape the lives they live. Turns out, fate as more in store for them than they desire.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Serial Deception
programme.desc: When dozens of women vanish from the sunshine state in the late 60s, they're presumed runways. It isn't until police discover the bodies of two missing teens that they uncover the sadistic work of a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Obsession Has Its Price
programme.desc: Bill Douglas is a respected doctor at Tufts University in Boston. But his focus isn't on science – it's on a bombshell prostitute he met in a red light district called the Combat Zone. Together, they lead double lives… leading to someone's murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Man with Two Faces
programme.desc: Bloomington, Illinois Sergeant Jeff Pelo is a respected police officer. At home, he's a model father and husband. So when he's caught trespassing after midnight on a young woman's property, his spotless reputation comes under fire.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Get Rich Quick
programme.desc: These women think their men are worth more dead than alive. A scorned Southern belle tries to cash in on her ex's life; a countess clings to her riches through violent means; and a mother of two trades her husband for another shot at the good life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: When these women exposed their true selves, their men found out they'd been 'Sleeping With The Enemy.' A beauty queen tried to free herself from family duties; an accountant's tryst turned deadly; and a valedictorian made sure her man coudn't leave.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cash In
programme.desc: The stakes are high and the chips are down when these Deadly Women decide to 'Cash In.'

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Mercy
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in what appears to be a home-invasion robbery. Closer inspection makes detectives believe it was a personal attack, and look for suspects, including his wife.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Confession
programme.desc: Melissa Atkin is found bound and murdered in her home in Smyrna, Tennessee. Eventually, the investigation focuses in on two individuals, with a series of recorded phone calls proving vital in exonerating one of them, whilst incriminating the other.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free
programme.desc: When Detectives looking for missing Mom, Tami Reay find blood in her car they arrest her husband, Brad. But then they receive a tip off, pointing the finger at an entirely new suspect.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds

programme.desc: A desperate married couple and two business-minded sisters compete for Scott's cash in a suburban face-off. When faced with the realities of both situations, he may need to forget the numbers and go with his gut.

programme.title: Buyers Bootcamp With Scott McGillivray: Charming Victorian vs. Shabby Semi
programme.desc: Scott has to decide between a massive Victorian fixer-upper and a dilapidated semi-detached. Both houses are in hot markets, and both have a ton of potential, but the rookie mistakes that have already been made will play a big part in his decision.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 'tis The Season
programme.desc: Why save your holiday favorites for the holidays, when you can enjoy them year-round at the fair! Some of your favorite holiday dishes get the carnival eats treatment.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Orange County, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb cruises into Orange County, California, to take down a three-pound burger slathered in a sauce made from three of the spiciest peppers on the planet.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Pie's the Limit
programme.desc: From savory to sweet and cheesy to meaty, the pie possibilities are endless. Wolfgang Puck picks a perfect fruit and cream pie in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Caution: Kids at Work! / The Snoozy Doozy Pet and Breakfast!
programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Vampirina: The Sleepover/ Portrait of a Vampire
programme.desc: Vee invites her new human friends over for a sleepover. On Vee's first day of school, she gets frightened during her class photo and leans on her new friend, Poppy, for support.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Where's Mickey? / Cuckoo in Hot Dog Hills!
programme.desc: Mickey helps Mayor McBeagle install a Flammer Jammer into his car. Cuckoo Loca's cousins visit from Paris.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy Gas/ Little Big Ape
programme.desc: When Goofy invents a new fuel to make the roadsters go faster, they wind up with unexpected results. The Happy Helpers try to capture a gorilla that is loose in Clarabelle's house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moonstruck: Race to the Moon/ Moonstruck: Luna Fortress
programme.desc: The PJ Masks must travel to the moon to keep Luna Girl from improving her Luna Magnet powers.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Wolfy Kids / Wolf-O-Saurus
programme.desc: The PJ Masks face the newest villains in town: the Wolfies.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Upside-Down Day / Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: When Summer has a case of bad-day-itis, Gonzo's cure is turning the whole playroom upside down. Later, Animal loses a tooth but the Tooth Fairy didn't leave him anything.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: How Kermit Got His Groove/ One Small Problem
programme.desc: When Rizzo the Rat arrives and makes a mess in the playroom, the only way the Muppet Babies can get him to stop is to defeat him in a dance-off. Summer is tired of being the smallest Muppet Baby and enlists Dr. Bunsen Honeydew and Beaker to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Seat at the Theatre/ Bye Bye Butterfly
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a butterfly get home to its family in Mexico. The pugs push Bob's office chair to a theater to see his favorite play.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Ninja Moths/ Who's Got the Owl Power?
programme.desc: Gekko learns to let go of his pride to stop a new villainous team! Owlette is tricked by Night Ninja to find ingredients for his new dastardly invention.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Gekko and the Opposite Ray/ PJ Masks vs. Bad Guys United
programme.desc: Romeo's newest device turns Owlette and Catboy into villains! All the villains join forces to finally defeat the PJ Masks once and for all!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Dinosaur Romp
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake's Tick-Tock Time Machine lets a little dinosaur named Baby Dinah loose in the Clubhouse Carnival, Mickey and pals travel back in time to return Baby Dinah to her prehistoric home .

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals discover a mystery egg among Goofy's rock collection; they try to find out what kind of animal is inside in order to return it to its mother. In the meantime, Donald Duck serves as a reluctant babysitter when the little egg develops.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Grandpa Camp / A Backyard Divided
programme.desc: It's grandparent's day and since Fozzie has never met his grandparents, Kermit finds two people to fill in for him, Statler and Waldorf. Later, when Gonzo and Piggy can't seem to get along, they divide the backyard into two separate kingdoms.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Blanket Fort/ Playground Pirates
programme.desc: Summer and Piggy surprise their friends by building a blanket fort so large that it becomes a blanket kingdom. When Miss Nanny loses her earring, the Muppet Babies use their imaginations to turn into pirates and follow a treasure map to find it.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Goofy Race! / Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks!
programme.desc: Goofy designs the first ever Goofy Race! When Cuckoo Loca's cuckoo clock is broken, Minnie and Daisy decide to get her a new one.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members in Paris.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Lost Lion
programme.desc: Mickey volunteers to help Donald find his favourite stuffed lion for bedtime.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Pajama Party
programme.desc: Minnie's Clubhouse pajama party turns into a camp out under the stars in order to accommodate last minute guest Willie the Giant.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Clubhouse Rocks
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals join together for a Clubhouse battle of the bands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Band Concert
programme.desc: The Sensational Six Polka Band is planning to provide the musical accompaniment for the baby elephants' dance performance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super Goof's Super Puzzle
programme.desc: In order to help his friends solve a puzzle, Goofy uses his alter-ego 'Super Goof'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and Minnie's Jungle Safari
programme.desc: Minnie is determined to snap a photo of the Hula Hibiscus that only blooms once a year.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Coconutty Monkey
programme.desc: Coco the Monkey is planning to have a Coconutty Milk Party for everyone.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pete's Beach Blanket Luau
programme.desc: It's the hottest day of the year and Pete decides to put on a Luau down at the lake.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: A Surprise for Minnie
programme.desc: Mickey enlists our help in making and delivering a special card for Minnie.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Racing Rivals/ The Hapless Helpers
programme.desc: Minnie comes up with a special race that can include her visiting childhood friend. While the girls enjoy a spa day, the boys fill in as Happy Helpers.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: It's Wiki Wiki Time/ Happy Hula Helpers!
programme.desc: Donald's Hawaiian vacation is interrupted when the rest of the gang arrives for a big relay race. The Happy Helpers are tasked with teaching a hula dance for a birthday celebration.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Perfecto Day!/ Running of the Roadsters!
programme.desc: While in Madrid, Mickey plans a perfect day for Minnie, but a playful baby bull has other plans. Minnie and Daisy make a bet with Mickey and Donald over who will win the race.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Mazu Takes a Chance/ The Lost Egg
programme.desc: Mazu must protect a helpless dragonfly from raptors; Rocky learns how to be gentle with an egg he's found.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Challenge / Giganto's Boss
programme.desc: The raptors challenge the Dinos to a game of basketball for the rights to the playground; Rocky convinces everyone he's the Giganto-Whisperer.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ski Trippin'!/ My Fair Pete
programme.desc: On a winter ski trip with her friends, Daisy remembers that she doesn't know how to ski! Pete is worried that he won't be able to impress his Mama when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Big Surprise/ Meet the Beagles
programme.desc: Goofy struggles to keep Minnie's surprise for Mickey's birthday a secret. The Happy Helpers are asked to help a band get back together.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Dylan/ Armadylan'd and Dangerous
programme.desc: After stopping an asteroid from crashing into the city, Armadylan thinks he's one of the PJ Masks. Romeo tries to use Armadylan's powers to improve his lab.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Terrible Two-Some / Owlette's Luna Trouble
programme.desc: Gekko has to babysit his two teammates, Kitty Boy and Chiclet, and save the world. Owlette must put aside her jealous feelings to get back Luna Girl's board and magnet from Romeo.

programme.desc: International superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers. Join Ralph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey as they master new weapons, battle absurd mutants and discover a hidden city beneath New York.

programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Crash and Burnout
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Breakout
programme.desc: Kaz and Norath try to help their friends while being pursued by a deadly bounty hunter.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: The Mutiny
programme.desc: Kragan buys a secret weapon to capture the Colossus and take over. When Synara discovers this plan she tries to warn Kaz and crew, but it may be too late!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Daytrip of Doom!
programme.desc: The nephews take Webby to Funso's Fun Zone and have a dangerous run-in with the Beagle Boys. Donald rebels against Mrs. Beakley's strict "house rules."

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Other Bin of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Best Friends Furever/ Fantasy Vamp
programme.desc: Mavis promises to have a spa day with Wendy and have lunch with the werewolf twins at the same time. Mavis wins two tickets to the phlegm ball fantasy camp.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Stepmonsters/ Better Know Your Mavis
programme.desc: Mavis convinces Pedro and Wendy to get to know their new stepparents. Mavis' friends take care of her when she is sick.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Foot Club
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: My Own Worst Ememy
programme.desc: Doc Ock, in Spider-Man's body, intends to bring New York to its knees, but his new brain still contains memories of Uncle Ben.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fan Friction
programme.desc: When Karmi starts posting fan fiction about Big Hero 6, depicting Hiro as her boyfriend, Hiro is embarrassed and wants her to stop.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Blading Together! Turbo Awakening!
programme.desc: As Aiger trains for his impending battle against Phi, Shu arrives with a re-forged Spryzen to lend a hand. Meanwhile, Toko unites the Bey Club and the Wild Bey Gang to try and find Phi’s weakness—if he has one.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Battling Besties!
programme.desc: As the Alola Pokémon League marches on, friends and rivals alike give it their all!

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Will Cain gives you his unfiltered take on the biggest stories in the sports world.

programme.title: NBA: The Jump
programme.desc: Daily NBA discussion featuring the latest news and stories with a panel of NBA analysts and current players.

programme.title: Jalen & Jacoby
programme.desc: Jalen Rose and David Jacoby give the people what they want, breaking down the latest in sports and pop culture as only they can.

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: Bomani Jones and Pablo Torre discuss the latest in sports.

programme.title: Highly Questionable
